items.label: docs-archived
messages: Now let me read the spec more completely and check existing summary data:
Now I have a clear picture. Let me check test results from the pipeline data:
Good, now I have all the context I need. Let me check if `_CHANGES.json` already exists (git status showed it as untracked):
Now I have all the information. Let me create the change manifest and summary documents.
Now let me verify the files were written correctly and commit:

The docs-archived phase is complete. Here's what was accomplished:  ## Summary  **Created two documentation artifacts for `product-quick-view`:**  ### 1. `product-quick-view_CHANGES.json` — Change Manifest Structured JSON documenting all 6 changed files with type (added/modified), category (storefront/test/e2e/docs), and one-line descriptions. Includes test results: **26 unit tests passed, 0 failures**.  ### 2. `product-quick-view_SUMMARY.md` — Human-Readable Summary Comprehensive feature summary covering: - **What changed:** 2 new components (QuickViewModal, ProductTile override), 2 test suites, 1 E2E smoke test, 1 spec document - **Architecture decisions:** Override pattern (not fork), reused base hooks (`useProductViewModal`, `ProductView`), responsive CSS-only hover, product type guards, event isolation - **Pipeline execution metrics:** 6 steps all passed, ~14m 29s total duration, 26 unit tests  ### Key Implementation Details - **QuickViewModal** — Chakra modal using `useProductViewModal` hook to fetch full product data and render `ProductView` with loading/error states - **ProductTile override** — Wraps base tile with a slide-up overlay bar; hidden for sets/bundles; uses `preventDefault`/`stopPropagation` to prevent PDP navigation

shellCommands.command: cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && git log project/pwa-kit...HEAD --oneline -- apps/commerce-storefront 2>/dev/null | head -30
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && git diff project/pwa-kit --name-only -- apps/commerce-storefront | grep -v 'in-progress/' | grep -v 'coverage/' | sort
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && git show project/pwa-kit:apps/commerce-storefront/overrides/app/components/quick-view-modal/index.jsx 2>/dev/null | head -5 || echo "NOT IN BASE"

cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && git diff project/pwa-kit HEAD -- apps/commerce-storefront/overrides/app/components/quick-view-modal/ apps/commerce-storefront/overrides/app/components/product-tile/ apps/com
cat > /workspaces/DAGent-t/apps/commerce-storefront/in-progress/product-quick-view_SUMMARY.md << 'MDEOF' ↵ # Feature Summary — Product Quick View ↵ > Generated: 2026-04-12T20:05:31.077Z ↵ ## Overview
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && bash tools/autonomous-factory/agent-commit.sh docs "docs(feature): generate change manifest and summary for product-quick-view"
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && npm run pipeline:complete product-quick-view docs-archived

items.label: doc-architect
messages: Roam tools are unavailable (MCP connection denied). Falling back to standard tools. Let me read the full spec and explore the codebase structure.
Now let me check the existing overrides and the in-progress directory structure:
Now I have a comprehensive understanding of the codebase. Let me check the routes and existing pages for the full picture:
I now have all the context I need. Let me create the two architecture documents.
Let me use bash to create the files:
Both documents created. Let me verify the Mermaid diagrams are valid and the files look correct:
Documents created successfully. Now let me commit and mark the pipeline as complete:
Committed successfully. Now let me complete the pipeline:
Pipeline phase marked as done. Now commit the pipeline state:

The **doc-architect** phase is complete. Here's a summary of what was produced:  ## Deliverables  ### 1. `product-quick-view_ARCHITECTURE.md` (299 lines, 11KB) - **C4 Context Diagram** — Storefront ↔ SCAPI ↔ Managed Runtime ecosystem - **C4 Container Diagram** — Component relationships within the Quick View feature - **Component Data Flow Diagram** — From PLP grid through tile override → modal → SDK hooks → SCAPI - **Deployment View** — Browser → Managed Runtime (SSR + proxy) → Commerce Cloud - **Sequence Diagram** — Full Quick View open → product fetch → variant selection → Add to Cart flow - **Component Inventory** — 2 new components, 5 reused base components, 2 test files - **Override Architecture** — How PWA Kit extensibility pattern works with `ccExtensibility.overridesDir` - **Technology Stack** — PWA Kit v3, Chakra UI v2, commerce-sdk-react, React Query, Jest, Playwright  ### 2. `product-quick-view_RISK-ASSESSMENT.md` (206 lines, 12KB) - **5 ADRs** — Override-and-wrap pattern, hook reuse, Box-as-button, sets/bundles exclusion, mobile-first visibility - **Blast Radius Analysis** — Medium impact (all PLPs affected), but wraps base component safely - **Risk Register** — 4 short-term risks (all Low severity), 5 long-term risks (one Medium: PWA Kit upgrade) - **Risk Matrix** — Visual severity mapping - **Security Assessment** — No credential exposure, XSS/CSRF mitigated - **Accessibility Compliance** — WCAG 2.1 AA across 5 criteria - **Performance Impact** — +~2KB gzipped, negligible TTI/LCP impact  **Note:** Roam MCP tools were unavailable (denied by security hook). Analysis was performed using standard file exploration tools.

shellCommands.command: cat > /workspaces/DAGent-t/apps/commerce-storefront/in-progress/product-quick-view_ARCHITECTURE.md << 'ARCH_EOF' ↵ # Architecture Report: Product Quick View ↵ > **Feature:** `product-quick-view` ↵ > *

cat > /workspaces/DAGent-t/apps/commerce-storefront/in-progress/product-quick-view_RISK-ASSESSMENT.md << 'RISK_EOF' ↵ # Risk Assessment: Product Quick View ↵ > **Feature:** `product-quick-view` ↵ > **

echo "=== ARCHITECTURE.md ===" && wc -l /workspaces/DAGent-t/apps/commerce-storefront/in-progress/product-quick-view_ARCHITECTURE.md && echo "=== RISK-ASSESSMENT.md ===" && wc -l /workspaces/DAGent-t/
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && bash tools/autonomous-factory/agent-commit.sh docs "docs(arch): architecture report and risk assessment for product-quick-view"
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && npm run pipeline:complete product-quick-view doc-architect
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && bash tools/autonomous-factory/agent-commit.sh pipeline "chore(pipeline): mark doc-architect complete for product-quick-view"
